title: Budget to include additional salary
doc_html:
§322. Budget to include additional salary

           The governing authority of each of the parishes composing the Fifteenth Judicial District shall annually, and at the same time it prepares its general budget of expenses, budget an amount sufficient to pay the salaries fixed in R.S. 16:321.
doc_text:
§322.  Budget to include additional salary
The governing authority of each of the parishes composing the Fifteenth
Judicial District shall annually, and at the same time it prepares its general
budget of expenses, budget an amount sufficient to pay the salaries fixed in
R.S. 16:321.
